summary.intent: Apply 6 Codex pass-3 review findings to the tags_input component, fixing bugs around editable re-check, no-op ValueChange events, controlled input accumulation, Auto direction resolution, blank commit behavior, and hidden input name attribute.
summary.outcome: All 6 fixes implemented and verified: 150 tests pass, clippy clean, proptest green, 97.56% line coverage, all 10 xci-fast gates pass. Changes committed and pushed; Codex pass-4 re-trigger queued.

repo: set_props can change the `editable` prop on a tag mid-edit (live toggle), so editable must be re-checked at CommitEdit time, not just at edit-start.
Blank commits should be rejected (no delete) — blank input on CommitEdit is a no-op, not a tag removal.
Controlled input accumulation must be built from pending() rather than from previous state snapshots.
Auto direction can be resolved via Locale::is_rtl() from context, which is cleaner than the adapter round-trip used by the tabs component.
Hidden input name attribute should be omitted entirely when unset, not rendered as an empty attribute.
Delimiter-split and paste paths should emit ValueChange only when an actual value change occurs (conditional, not unconditional).
The project uses `Env { locale, ..Env::default() }` with `Locale::parse("ar")` to construct an RTL environment in tests.
Coverage gate threshold is 90.1%; actual coverage in this component was 97.56% line with 0 uncovered production branches.
The spec lives at spec/components/selection/tags-input.md and must be kept in sync with source — §1.5, §1.6, §1.7, and §4 RTL sections were all updated.
The project gate command is `cargo xci-fast` with 10 sub-gates.

code.finding: CommitEdit arm now re-checks editable prop, rejects blank input as a no-op (no remove), and uses pending() for controlled accumulation.
is_toward_prev helper updated to resolve Auto direction via Locale::is_rtl() from the ambient Env context.
input_change_plan and paste_plan now gate ValueChange emission on an actual value difference.
Snapshot updated to reflect removal of empty Name attribute from hidden input when name prop is unset.
§1.5 CommitEdit row updated to document blank-rejection and editable-toggle behavior; §4 RTL section updated with Auto-resolution note.

workflow: Codex review is run in numbered passes (pass 3, pass 4); each pass produces findings that are addressed, then Codex is re-triggered for the next pass.

The workflow is: implement fixes → run tests → update snapshots → add TDD tests for new behaviors → check coverage → run full gate → commit/push → reply to review threads → resolve → re-trigger Codex.
Background tasks (gate runs) are tracked via task-notifications, allowing other preparation work (capturing thread reply targets, reading spec) to proceed concurrently.
Snapshot tests are used for HTML/DOM output verification; behavior changes require both updating assertion tests and re-accepting snapshots.
New TDD tests were added for all 6 pass-3 fixes alongside the implementation.

friction: Codex pass-3 findings #1 and #5 contradicted earlier implementation assumptions (editable can change live; blank commits should not delete), requiring re-work of the CommitEdit arm.
Multiple Read calls were needed to locate the exact line ranges for the Blur and CommitEdit arms before editing, suggesting the file is large and navigation is non-trivial.
The Auto direction resolution required investigating two different APIs (tabs adapter pattern vs Locale::is_rtl()) before choosing the right approach.
open_items: Codex pass-4 review has been triggered but not yet completed — further findings may require additional fixes.
Commit, push, thread replies, and resolve actions were queued but not shown as completed in this transcript segment.
